case_title: THE SALVATION ARMY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION vs. ROBINSON, TRUEDELL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SALVATION ARMY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, TRUEDELL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
